title: Getting cannabis from a licensed producer - Canada.ca
content:
## Getting cannabis from a licensed producer
Sample medical document, list of licensed producers and how to get cannabis for medical purposes from them.

## Services and information

### List of licensed producers
Licensed producers authorized to produce and sell under the Access to Cannabis for Medical Purposes Regulations (ACMPR).

### Sample medical document
An example of the document needed from your health care practitioner to purchase from licensed producers.

### Cannabis from licensed producers
Step-by-step instructions on how to get cannabis for medical purposes from a licensed producer.
